questions.question: In Shor's algorithm, QPE is used to find:

options.text: The period of a^x mod N

questions.explanation: QPE finds the period r, then classical post-processing extracts factors.

questions.question: For quantum chemistry, QPE estimates:
questions.explanation: QPE with U = e^(-iHt) extracts energy eigenvalues.

questions.question: The unitary in chemistry QPE is typically:

options.text: e^(-iHt) where H is the Hamiltonian

questions.explanation: Time evolution under Hamiltonian H encodes energies as phases.

questions.question: QPE can only be used with Shor's algorithm.
questions.explanation: QPE has many applications: chemistry, simulation, linear algebra, etc.
